name: Userlist Email Automation API
what_it_does: Email and in-app messaging automation platform built for B2B SaaS — with REST API for managing users, companies (multi-tenant), events, and campaign triggers, supporting both individual user and account-level lifecycle email flows.
use_cases: Syncing user and company data from SaaS product to Userlist for lifecycle email automation
Triggering behavioral email campaigns based on user events via REST API
Managing multi-tenant company accounts with company-level email flows
Running onboarding sequences for both individual users and their organizations
In-app messaging (banners, tooltips) alongside email from unified platform
not_for: Transactional email (password resets, invoices) — use Postmark or SendGrid
Consumer email marketing at scale — Userlist focuses on B2B SaaS
Teams needing SMS, push notifications, or multi-channel beyond email and in-app
best_when: A B2B SaaS team needs account-aware lifecycle email (both user-level and company-level flows) with simple API integration and in-app messaging.
avoid_when: You need transactional email, consumer marketing, or high-volume mass email campaigns.

auth.notes: Push key for server-side API calls. Bearer token auth. Application-scoped access. No fine-grained scopes. Separate keys per application.

pricing.paid_tiers: From $149/month (1,000 users); scales by user count
pricing.notes: No free tier — premium pricing for B2B SaaS focus. Austrian company (Vienna) with GDPR compliance. Small team with high customer focus. Company-aware email flows are key differentiator vs. competitors. Stripe integration for trial/subscription triggers.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply; generous for typical SaaS usage

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for users, companies, events, and relationships. Ruby/Python/PHP/JS SDKs simplify integration. Webhook support for email events. Company (account) object is unique — supports B2B account-level flows. Good documentation with practical examples.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: User upsert idempotent by identifier. Company upsert idempotent by identifier. Relationship creation idempotent. Event tracking creates new event records — use deduplication.
known_agent_gotchas: Company (account) object requires explicit creation before associating users
Domain verification required before sending — not automatable
In-app messaging requires JavaScript snippet — not pure API feature
Pricing based on user count — unexpected user growth can increase costs quickly

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant — Austrian company. EU data residency. API push keys server-side only. Domain verification prevents email abuse. No formal certifications beyond GDPR. Small team with good privacy practices.
